zh.Heswall cum Oldfiel, Trafford, Cheshire,: 英國英格蘭爾賀斯瓦爾

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Patric de Hallowell於1215年出生在英國英格蘭爾賀斯瓦爾時，他的父親John De Haselwall26歲，母親Mrs. John De Haselwall21歲。他和Agnes de Thurstanton至少有5個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1309年在他的家鄉享年94歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Patric de Hallowell于1215年出生在英国英格兰爾賀斯瓦爾时，他的父亲John De Haselwall26岁，母亲Mrs. John De Haselwall21岁。他和Agnes de Thurstanton至少有5个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1309年在他的家乡享年94岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hallowell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Halliwell (Lancashire) or Holywell (Huntingtonshire, Northumberland), named in Middle English hali, holi (Old English hālig) ‘holy’ + wel(le) (Old English well(a)) ‘well, spring’, or from any of numerous other places called with these elements (see Hollowell ).

variants.name: Hollowell
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): habitational name from Hollowell in Northamptonshire, from Middle English hali, holi ‘holy’ + wel(le) ‘well’ (Old English hālig ‘holy’ + well(a) ‘well, spring’). Compare Halliwell .

nameMeanings.name: Patric
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval French form of both the male and female Latin names Patricius ( see Patrick ) and Patricia . In modern French it is used only as a boy's name, but in the English-speaking world it is used mainly for girls, apparently under the influence of names such as Bernice .

variants.name: Patrick
meanings: Name of the apostle and patron saint of Ireland ( c.389–461 ), Gaelic Pádraig. He was a Christian Briton and a Roman citizen, who as a young man was captured and enslaved by raiders from Ireland. He escaped and went to Gaul before returning home to Britain. In about 419 he felt a call to do missionary work in Ireland. He studied for twelve years at Auxerre, and in 432 returned to Ireland. For the rest of his life it is difficult to distinguish fact from fiction. He apparently went to the court of the high kings at Tara and made some converts there; then he travelled around Ireland making further converts until about 445 , when he established his archiepiscopal see at Armagh. By the time of his death almost the whole of Ireland is said to have been converted to Christianity. He is also credited with codifying the laws of Ireland. In his Latin autobiography, as well as in later tradition, his name appears as Patricius ‘patrician’ (i.e. belonging to the Roman senatorial or noble class), but this may actually represent a Latinized form of some lost Celtic (British) name. In Ireland in particular, it has been one of the most enduringly popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Patric de Hallowell was born in 1215, in Heswall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John De Haselwall, was 26 and his mother, Mrs. John De Haselwall, was 21. He had at least 5 sons and 4 daughters with Agnes de Thurstanton. He died in 1309, in his hometown, at the age of 94.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Patric de Hallowell est né en 1215, à Heswall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John De Haselwall, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John De Haselwall, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles avec Agnes de Thurstanton. Il est décédé en 1309, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 94 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Patric de Hallowell 1215 in Heswall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John De Haselwall 26 und seine Mutter Mrs. John De Haselwall 21. Er hatte mit Agnes de Thurstanton mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1309 im Alter von 94 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Patric de Hallowell è nato il nel 1215 nel Heswall, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John De Haselwall, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. John De Haselwall, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie con Agnes de Thurstanton. Morì nel 1309, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 94 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Patric de Hallowellが1215年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアヘスワルで生まれた時，父John De Haselwallは26歳，母Mrs. John De Haselwallは21歳であった。彼はAgnes de Thurstantonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1309年に故郷で94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Patric de Hallowell(이)가 1215년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 헤스월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John De Haselwall(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John De Haselwall(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Agnes de Thurstanton(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1309년 그의 고향에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Patric de Hallowell nasceu em 1215, em Heswall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John De Haselwall, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John De Haselwall, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas com Agnes de Thurstanton. Ele faleceu em 1309, em sua cidade natal, com 94 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Patric de Hallowell родился в 1215 г. в местности хесвалл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John De Haselwall было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John De Haselwall, 21. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери от Agnes de Thurstanton. Он умер в 1309 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 94 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Patric de Hallowell nació en 1215, en Heswall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John De Haselwall, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mrs. John De Haselwall, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas con Agnes de Thurstanton. Murió en 1309, en su pueblo, a la edad de 94 años.
